name: OUI-Spy
description: MAC OUI vendor-identification scanner — fingerprints nearby WiFi/BLE devices by manufacturer (OUI) prefix. Built via PlatformIO; no formal releases, flash from source/local .bin.
note: Aligned with flash_core OuiSpyProfile (colonelpanichacks/oui-spy-unified-blue — the combined/flashable build). The meta repo colonelpanichacks/oui-spy has no formal releases.
